history.text: German Togoland appears in Togo's historical record.
French Togoland appears in Togo's historical record.
Togo became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Togo joined the United Nations, confirming broad international recognition.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Togo.
